---
name: Bug report
about: Track a lightweight repo-local bug
title: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the bug in 2-4 sentences. Prefer plain language over deep engineering detail.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The user-visible bug is fixed
- [ ] The affected screen, flow, or contract looks correct afterward
- [ ] Relevant repo validation passes

## Evidence

Optional: screenshot links, API examples, logs, or a short note about where the evidence lives.

## Related Issues

Optional: parent issue, child issues, or dependent bug links.

## Notes / Unknowns

Optional: ambiguity, rollout caveat, or follow-up context.
